titles.title: You Make Me Lie Down in Green Pastures

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You make me lie down in green pastures, You make me wanting for nothing; You fill my hunger with honey from Your sweet, sweet Word.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You let me worship before You So I will love and adore You; You are my Shepherd, You are my Jesus, You are my Lord.
